title: ctenolophonaceae
intro: The Ctenolophonaceae is a family of flowering plants, specifically a group of flowering plants that are classified together due to shared characteristics and evolutionary relationships. It is a monophyletic group, meaning that all its members share a common ancestor and are more closely related to each other than to other plants outside the family. The Ctenolophonaceae family includes several plant species that are primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions. As a family of flowering plants, Ctenolophonaceae is a level of classification that groups related plant genera together.
